title: Secure, Performant, and Maintainable Python Delivery · Language Clinic: Python Capstone Evidence
summary: Deliver a trustworthy local automation product for a community program with operator and learner documentation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python capstone evidence increment in a production-shaped local automation capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Defend architecture, correctness, accessibility of terminal output, security, failure recovery, and future extensions with evidence.
Produce a clean environment install, command entry point, version, dependency record, tests, and reproducible release checklist.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
